name: @mwguerra/hull
description: Tiny native desktop apps from your Vue/React UI — a prebuilt C++ web-view host you drive with npm scripts. No compiler, no Electron.
author: mwguerra
comment:optionalDependencies: The per-platform host packages (@mwguerra/hull-<os>-<arch>) are injected here at publish time by the monorepo's scripts/prepare-publish.mjs (run from the repo root in CI) so npm installs only the matching binary. They are intentionally omitted from the repo manifest because npm validates workspace os/cpu and would reject non-matching platforms during local install.
